creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I see from the USB dump that your audio adapter is running version 1.09 of the firmware. Can you try upgrading to version 1.23 and collect new USB dump and USB audio logs. There is a utility in ports called dfu-util which my might be able to use under FreeBSD. Google for:

sony PHA firmware upgrade 1.23

--HPS
